item.title: Mastercard's $1.8B BVNK Buy: 4 Ways It's Accelerating Crypto's TradFi Takeover Amid Tally's Demise
item.description: Hey, have you heard about Mastercard dropping $1.8 billion on BVNK to supercharge stablecoin payments? Meanwhile, Tally's shutting down under regulatory heat—let's break down how this is pushing crypto deeper into traditional finance and what it could mean for your investments.
